description_long: This is a crumpled, empty aluminum can with a bright red exterior and prominent white Coca-Cola branding. The can is visibly deformed, with multiple dents and creases along its cylindrical body, indicating it has been crushed. The top features a standard pull-tab opening, which is fully open, and the bottom is slightly concave as is typical for beverage cans. Nutritional and product information is printed in white on the back side, while the front displays the iconic Coca-Cola script. The surface is glossy and reflects light, with some areas showing more pronounced wrinkling due to the deformation. The can is lightweight and hollow, with no visible liquid inside.
description: A crushed, empty red Coca-Cola aluminum can with white branding and a glossy, dented surface.
description_view_0: The top of the can is visible, showing the open pull-tab and the crumpled rim.
description_view_1: The side view highlights the Coca-Cola script and the extensive denting along the body.
description_view_2: The bottom of the can is visible, showing nutritional information and the concave base.
description_view_3: Another side view with the Coca-Cola logo and visible creases and dents.
attribute_label_or_branding: White Coca-Cola script logo on a red background, with additional white text for nutritional and product information on the back.
attribute_damage_or_deformation: Multiple dents and creases throughout the can, indicating it has been crushed.
